author.name: AmpExam
author.bio: AmpExam publishes free journeyman and master electrician exam practice questions and guides, built around the NEC content outlines the exams actually test.

comingSoon.promise: A free NEC-based journeyman practice test — conduit fill, box fill, grounding and bonding, Ohm's law, motor calcs. Coming soon.
